filter_reason: Agent infrastructure news from Google - background tasks and remote MCP in the Gemini API are squarely orchestration and interoperability.
summary: Google expanded Managed Agents in the Gemini API with background task execution, remote MCP support, and other features aimed at production-ready agents. Remote MCP support is notable interoperability news, since MCP is emerging as the cross-vendor standard for agent tool use. For teams building agents on Gemini, this moves more orchestration burden into Google's managed layer.
title: Expanding Managed Agents in Gemini API: background tasks, remote MCP and more
excerpt: We’re announcing new capabilities in Managed Agents in Gemini API so developers can build reliable, production-ready agents.
